title: salix × mairei
intro: Salix × mairei is a hybrid willow plant, specifically a cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the Chinese willow (Salix matsudana 'Mairei'), known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The bark of Salix × mairei contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, which has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and menstrual cramps, and is also believed to have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Salix × mairei, including tea, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
